prompt: A key customer is asking us to build a Slack integration. They say they'll churn without it. Should we build it? It would take about 3 sprints.
assertions: Uses the single feature evaluation format, not the full RICE framework
Includes opportunity cost — what does NOT get built if we build this?
Frequency of request is assessed (one customer vs pattern)
Confidence in value is rated with basis
Recommendation is one of BUILD / DEFER / DECLINE / DISCOVERY SPIKE
